data.title: WD-40 Co. announces quarterly dividend of $0.94 per share, payable Oct 31, 2025, to stockholders of record on Oct 20, 2025.
data.description: In San Diego, WD-40 Company (NASDAQ:WDFC) recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.94 per share on October 9, 2025. This dividend will be payable on October 31, 2025, to stockholders of record as of October 20, 2025. WD-40 Company is a global marketing organization known for developing and selling products that address various needs in workshops, factories, and homes worldwide.

data.title: Company provides statement on recent concerns about Montgomery Transport, addressing speculation on actions taken, including litigation with majority owners. (Characters: 143)
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama on October 9, 2025, there has been a growing worry about Montgomery Transport and its related companies. Recent discussions have raised concerns about certain actions taken, such as legal disputes with the main shareholders.
Ceasefire Reached Between Israel and Hamas Alongside Hostage Agreement

data.title: WuXi Biologics (2269.HK) earns AAA ESG rating from MSCI for third year in a row.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, in Shanghai, WuXi Biologics (stock symbol: 2269.HK), a prominent worldwide Contract Research, Development, and Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO), revealed that it has been granted the prestigious AAA ESG rating by Morgan Stanley Capital International (MSCI) for the third year in a row.

data.title: Faraday Factory Japan LLC and Zenno partner to advance HTS magnets for satellites, enhancing manoeuvrability.
data.description: Collaboration between Faraday Factory Japan LLC and a space-flight systems company based in New Zealand is set to enhance the development of innovative electric equipment for satellite manoeuvrability. This joint effort, announced on October 9, 2025, aims to leverage the expertise of Faraday Factory, a top superconducting tape manufacturer, in creating advanced technology for space applications. The partnership signifies a move towards cutting-edge solutions in the aerospace industry.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for PubMatic investors between Feb 27, 2025 and Aug 11, 2025. Contact James Wilson if affected.
data.description: Attorney James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in PubMatic between February 27, 2025, and August 11, 2025, to reach out to him for a discussion on potential options. If you were affected during this period, contact Attorney Wilson for assistance.

data.title: Investors of Tronox may contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for losses between Feb 2, 2025 and July 30, 2025. Contact James Wilson for options.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in Tronox during the period of February 2, 2025, to July 30, 2025, to reach out to him directly to explore their potential options. If you were affected by this and wish to review your legal rights, please consider contacting him for more information.

data.title: Marimaca Copper Corp submits NI 43-101 report for Marimaca Oxide Deposit project in Chile. (Total characters: 82)
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 9, 2025, Marimaca Copper Corp. (TSX: MARI) (ASX: MC2) reported the submission of the Feasibility Study technical report for the Marimaca Oxide Deposit project in Chile's Antofagasta Region. The study provides detailed insights into the project's viability and potential. This update marks a significant milestone for the company as it continues its operations in the region.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Quanex Building Products investors for losses between Dec 12, 2024, and Sep 5, 2025. Contact James Wilson for more info.
data.description: Investors who experienced losses in Quanex between December 12, 2024, and September 5, 2025, are urged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson to reach out for a consultation on their options. Those affected can directly contact Wilson to discuss their legal recourse.

data.title: Intel places faith in Panther Lake AI chip on 18A process amidst $3 billion quarterly loss and market competition.
data.description: Intel has launched its initial processor using an 18A manufacturing process, coinciding with AMD's grow in market share, while Intel itself experienced a significant $3 billion loss in the last quarter.

data.title: Democratic Senators face backlash for suggesting a 'restricted list' to allow Treasury to flag risky DeFi protocols.
data.description: Democratic senators are being criticized for proposing a counter-plan that would grant the Treasury Department the power to designate high-risk decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols on a list of restricted entities.

Gold stabilized just below $4,000 an ounce, and silver pulled back from four-decade highs as investors booked profits following a sharp rally, part of a broader “debasement trade” where assets like precious metals and Bitcoin attract capital amid concerns over US fiscal deficits

data.title: Stock market rally pauses at record highs. Dow Jones futures rise. Palantir, Netflix, Oracle near buy points.
data.description: After reaching record highs, the stock market rally came to a halt. Several stocks including Palantir, Netflix, and Oracle are poised to be bought with their prices at buy points. Dow Jones Futures saw a rise following the bullish market pause.

data.title: Relativity honors legal industry leaders at 2025 Innovation Awards in Chicago, recognizing individuals and organizations driving progress.
data.description: Recognizing outstanding individuals and organizations for their contributions to advancing the industry, the winners of the 2025 Innovation Awards were revealed by Relativity, a leading global legal technology company, in Chicago on October 9th. The awards ceremony highlighted those who have shown exceptional dedication in driving progress, instigating change, and influencing the future of the sector. This year's recipients exemplified innovation in various aspects, including technology, strategy, and impact. The event showcased a total of [insert number] awardees, underscoring the significance of their work in shaping the industry landscape.
